title: Building a dynamic personal site with Antigravity and Gemma 4
summary: Google Cloud Tech demonstrates a static site generator built with Antigravity and Gemma models. The tool enables VS Code-styled website creation with theme switching and offline vector search using Gemini for summarization and embedding-gemma for vectorization at compile time.
writeup: Google Cloud Tech walks through a static site generator built with Antigravity and Gemma models that produces VS Code-styled websites with theme switching and offline vector search. The build pipeline uses Gemini for summarization and embedding-gemma for vectorization at compile time, so search runs without a live server. Takeaways: embeddings can be computed during the build rather than at request time, and combining HTML generation with local inference yields a self-contained, searchable static site.
